case_title: HUNTINGTON NATIONAL BANK, A NATIONAL BANKING VS. MARIE J. TIMBO PAREDES et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-26-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUNTINGTON NATIONAL BANK, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-28-2011 CONTINUED TO MAR-25-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610, TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY CLARK, JEFFREY A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNTINGTON NATIONAL BANK, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAREDES, MARIE J. TIMBO $13,611.69 PRINCIPAL, $1,700.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $420.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,731.69, SEE SCANNED DOC

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUNTINGTON NATIONAL BANK, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT PAREDES, MARIE J. TIMBO DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PAREDES, MARIE J. TIMBO
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-25-2011 CONTINUED TO JUN-24-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
